offerings.title: System Design
description: - Architectural Planning: Initial consultations focus on outlining the system architecture that best serves the applications goals and constraints.
- Data Modeling: A robust data model is constructed to aid the system's goals, taking into account both present needs and potential future scalability.
- API Design and Integration: Comprehensive API design and integration services are provided to ensure smooth communication between different system components or third-party services.
- Documentation and Training: Detailed documentation is provided for each component and process in the system.

offerings.title: Development
description: - Web Development: Crafting responsive and dynamic websites or web applications, using a combination of front-end and back-end technologies, to meet various online business needs.
- Mobile App Development: Creating native and cross-platform mobile applications that offer seamless user experiences across iOS Android and other mobile platforms.
- API Development and Integration: Building and integrating APIs to enable seamless communication between different software components, be it internal systems or third-party services.
- Database Development: Designing efficient database schemas and offering database management services that ensure high performance, security and scalability.

offerings.title: Generative AI & Automation
description: - LLM Integration & Prompt Engineering: Building AI-powered workflows and applications using modern LLM APIs, prompt engineering techniques, and structured AI pipelines for automation, moderation, summarization, and recommendations.
- AI Agents & Workflow Orchestration: Developing AI agents with tools such as LangChain, LangGraph, Hugging Face, and Llama-based models to automate complex business and operational tasks.

- AI-Powered Application Development: Integrating AI features into web and mobile applications including intelligent search, content generation, recommendation systems, moderation tooling, and conversational interfaces.
- ETL & Data Processing Pipelines: Building scalable ETL-style workflows and background processing systems in .NET and SQL for data transformation, reporting, integrations, and automation tasks.
- AI Consulting & Prototyping: Assisting startups and businesses in identifying practical AI opportunities, rapidly prototyping solutions, and implementing production-ready AI integrations.
- Documentation & Knowledge Transfer: Providing clear technical documentation and guidance for AI systems, workflows, integrations, and operational best practices.
